1010011111110001000111101000000101101100100100110101 - ASI: 23

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 10 * 1
  0101 = 0 * 101
  1000 = 10 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  10011 = 100 * 11
  11110 = 1111 * 0
  100000 = 1000 * 00
  100100 = 100 * 100
  0101101 = 0101 * 101
  1010011 = 10 * 10011
  10001000 = 1000 * 1000
  100110101 = 10011 * 0101
  10100111111 = 1010011 * 1111
  1000000101101 = 100000 * 0101101
  1000100011110 = 10001000 * 11110
  100100100110101 = 100100 * 100110101
  101001111111000100011110 = 10100111111 * 1000100011110
  1000000101101100100100110101 = 1000000101101 * 100100100110101
  1010011111110001000111101000000101101100100100110101 = 101001111111000100011110 * 1000000101101100100100110101
